name: Refrigerator – Lifestyle Home Appliance Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="fr-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="fr-img-fade" x1="0" y1="620" x2="0" y2="900" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="1"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="fr-bottom" x1="0" y1="1100" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="fr-cta" x1="716" y1="0" x2="1036" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_DARK"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="fr-img-vignette" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="55%" gradientUnits="objectBoundingBox">
      <stop offset="60%"  stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP" stop-opacity="0.5"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="fr-img-clip">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="900"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#fr-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: full-bleed product image top two-thirds -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_IMG_BG"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#fr-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="900" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 3: image bottom fade -->
  <rect x="0" y="620" width="1080" height="280" fill="url(#fr-img-fade)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: side vignette -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="900" fill="url(#fr-img-vignette)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: store badge top-left -->
  <rect x="48" y="48" width="200" height="48" rx="0" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP"/>
  <text x="148" y="79" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>

  <!-- LAYER 6: product badge top-right -->
  <rect x="832" y="48" width="200" height="48" rx="0" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.15" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.5"/>
  <text x="932" y="79" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_BADGE_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 7: copy section bg -->
  <rect x="0" y="900" width="1080" height="200" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>

  <!-- LAYER 8: product name — serif italic -->
  <text x="54" y="978"  font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="72" font-weight="900" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" letter-spacing="-1">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="54" y="1058" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif" font-size="72" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" letter-spacing="-1" font-style="italic">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 9: tagline right-aligned -->
  <text x="1032" y="960" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="17" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" fill-opacity="0.5" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="1032" y="988" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="17" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" fill-opacity="0.5" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 10: rule -->
  <line x1="54" y1="1074" x2="1026" y2="1074" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.12"/>

  <!-- LAYER 11: feature strip -->
  <rect x="0" y="1074" width="1080" height="106" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>

  <circle cx="90"  cy="1110" r="5" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="90"  y="1138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="90"  y="1162" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT1_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="180" y1="1086" x2="180" y2="1168" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.1"/>

  <circle cx="270" cy="1110" r="5" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="270" y="1138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="270" y="1162" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT2_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="380" y1="1086" x2="380" y2="1168" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.1"/>

  <circle cx="486" cy="1110" r="5" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="486" y="1138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="486" y="1162" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT3_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="596" y1="1086" x2="596" y2="1168" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.1"/>

  <circle cx="702" cy="1110" r="5" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="702" y="1138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="702" y="1162" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT4_VALUE</text>
  <line x1="816" y1="1086" x2="816" y2="1168" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.1"/>

  <circle cx="918" cy="1110" r="5" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="918" y="1138" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" fill-opacity="0.45" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT5_LABEL</text>
  <text x="918" y="1162" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP">PLACEHOLDER_FEAT5_VALUE</text>

  <line x1="54" y1="1180" x2="1026" y2="1180" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK_TOP" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.12"/>

  <!-- LAYER 12: dark bottom band -->
  <rect x="0" y="1180" width="1080" height="170" fill="url(#fr-bottom)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 13: price -->
  <text x="54" y="1248" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="14" font-weight="400" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="54" y="1316" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, serif"      font-size="88" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 14: CTA button -->
  <rect x="716" y="1200" width="320" height="80" rx="0" fill="url(#fr-cta)"/>
  <text x="876" y="1250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="500" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>
  <text x="876" y="1272" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL</text>

  <!-- LAYER 15: footer -->
  <text x="54" y="1342" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.2" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>

  <!-- LAYER 16: corner marks -->
  <path d="M0 64 L0 0 L64 0"         fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
  <path d="M1080 64 L1080 0 L1016 0" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
</svg>
